title: journaling-sessions entry envelope
description: Machine-readable contract for ONE journal entry, as parsed from the '--- ENTRY_START --- / --- CONTENT --- / --- ENTRY_END ---' envelope defined in output-format.md. Informative companion to that prose spec; if the two disagree, treat it as a conformance bug and fix it. ENUM CASE NOTE: this skill emits `type` in UPPERCASE and `origin`/`visibility` in lowercase. A consuming store that strict-parses enums should normalize case (or accept these exact spellings), because a case-only mismatch drops the entry as surely as an unknown value does.

type.description: Entry type. Emitted UPPERCASE; a store's strict enum should be a case-normalized superset of these.

author.description: Whose memory this is (not who is discussed). Stable, lowercase, of the form user:<identifier>. Partition key — bind to the target store's canonical id when a target_store profile is given.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 — when the entry was journaled.

occurred_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 — when the event actually happened, if different from timestamp.

area.description: Single-valued scope key. Consolidation is typically author+area-scoped, so reuse the target store's existing area vocabulary when one is given, or the entry is silently orphaned.

language.description: ISO 639-1 code of the entry's prose (en, pt, ...).

origin.description: Where the knowledge came from. Emitted lowercase. ('meditation' is reserved by some stores — never emit it.)

visibility.description: Retrieval scope. One of: private | public | team:<name>. Emitted lowercase.

session.description: kebab-case name for the arc this entry belongs to.

domains.description: 2-5 free-form subject tags; at least one broad, one narrow.

entities.description: Optional comma-separated people, products, systems referenced, in their most specific form.

confidence.description: Always emitted. Evidence-calibrated per output-format.md §9; a store may default it to 0.5 if ever absent and gate promotion on it.

validated.description: Optional. Emit `true` only when the entry survived genuine stress-testing; omit otherwise (never emit false). Parsed into a persistent, never-mutating boolean a store can filter and weight on. Complements the in-prose VALIDATED marker (§10).

refs.description: Optional cross-links — e.g. H-035, investigation-16, arXiv:2501.13956, supersedes:K-002.

summary.description: Optional single-sentence compact version for progressive disclosure; recommended for entries over ~200 words.
